---
title: "Oda World"
subtitle: "Technology, innovation, and ideas across borders."
body-classes: home-page
listing:
  contents: posts
  feed: true
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: "#f7f9fc"
title-block-style: plain
---

Welcome to **Oda World** — a blog about technology, innovation, and ideas that travel across borders, disciplines, and perspectives.
